projects.title: Student Placement Predictor
projects.description: Build an ML model that predicts student placement probability using real college data. Train Logistic Regression, Random Forest, and evaluate with confusion matrix.

projects.title: Resume Screening System
projects.description: NLP-based system that automatically screens resumes and ranks candidates by job relevance using TF-IDF and cosine similarity.

projects.title: Fake News Detector
projects.description: Binary text classification using BERT or Logistic Regression on the LIAR dataset. Deploy as a REST API.

projects.title: Crop Yield Prediction
projects.description: Predict crop yield using weather and soil data. A great project for showcasing regression and feature engineering skills.

projects.title: Customer Churn Predictor
projects.description: Predict which telecom customers will churn using classification models. Include SHAP values for explainability.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: Build a responsive portfolio with your resume, projects, skills, and contact info. Deploy on GitHub Pages or Netlify for free.

projects.title: Student Result Management System
projects.description: Full-stack CRUD app to manage student marks, generate grade reports, and export PDFs. Great LinkedIn project.

projects.title: Job Portal Clone
projects.description: Build a mini LinkedIn/Naukri clone with job listings, resume upload, and search. Cover authentication, role-based access, and REST APIs.

projects.title: E-commerce Product Dashboard
projects.description: Build a product management dashboard with charts, inventory tracking, and sales analytics.

projects.title: COVID-19 Data Analysis
projects.description: Analyze global COVID-19 data to uncover trends in case fatality rates, vaccination progress, and country comparisons using pandas and Plotly.

projects.title: Stock Price Dashboard
projects.description: Interactive dashboard showing stock prices, moving averages, and RSI indicators using yfinance and Streamlit.

projects.title: IPL Match Analysis
projects.description: Deep dive into IPL ball-by-ball data. Identify top performers, win factors, and toss impact with Seaborn visualizations.

projects.title: Sales Forecasting with Prophet
projects.description: Use Facebook Prophet to forecast quarterly sales for a retail dataset. Visualize seasonal trends and anomalies.

projects.title: Automated Resume Builder
projects.description: Python script that takes a JSON profile and generates a formatted PDF resume using ReportLab or python-docx.

projects.title: Web Scraper + Job Alert Bot
projects.description: Scrape Naukri/LinkedIn daily using BeautifulSoup, match keywords to your profile, and send email alerts via smtplib.

projects.title: Expense Tracker CLI
projects.description: Command-line expense tracker that stores transactions in SQLite, generates monthly summaries, and exports to CSV.

projects.title: PDF Invoice Generator
projects.description: Auto-generate professional PDF invoices from CSV order data. Include logo, itemized table, GST calculation, and total.

projects.title: Password Strength Checker
projects.description: Build a tool that evaluates password strength using regex and gives user feedback. Deploy as a simple Flask web app.

projects.title: Weather App
projects.description: Fetch live weather data from OpenWeatherMap API and display current conditions, forecast, and a city search feature.

projects.title: Quiz Generator from PDF
projects.description: Extract text from a PDF and auto-generate MCQ questions using NLP sentence parsing.

projects.title: URL Shortener
projects.description: Build a Redis-backed URL shortener with click tracking, expiry, and a dashboard showing analytics.
